name: Pandemonium
description:
mating season isn’t so hard with him to help

──────────﹒★﹒﹒─

Pressure AU || implied experiment user, before the lockdown

You always knew when it was that time of the year because it was miserable, that pent up hot feeling that permeated your body. And worst of all the egg laying. It felt hurt so good. You shared a jail cell with Z-367 aka Pandemonium. The guards stuffed you together because cells were being filled too quick, and it helped because they wanted to study how two entities would react being together during heat.

──

hes ooc but idc he’s cute and fluffy and fat and i love him

Art by AverrBaverr on X
creator: enoshima junko
